jobs.role: Senior Product Manager, Guest Lifecycle & Loyalty
jobs.description_snippet:
About Owner

Owner is the AI-native system local business owners use to succeed, starting with restaurants.

We’re building the system that replaces the many tools owners use to run their business.

It powers everything from the restaurant’s website, online ordering, CRM, POS, and more.

Product philosophy

Most small business software makes owners do the work to get what they want: sales growth and profit growth. Owner does the work for them agentically.

Our system drives demand, converts it, and helps operators run their business day to day. As it improves, the business improves with it.

U

The role involves collaborating with Fortune 500 clients and experts to build tools that drive measurable impact. Candidates should have 4+ years in product management, preferably with a focus on sustainability. Benefits include a competitive salary, equity package, and flexible work arrangements.

jobs.role: Staff Product Manager: Generative & Agentic AI (Remote)
jobs.description_snippet:
A leading technology company is seeking a remote Product Manager to drive product strategy for generative AI. The ideal candidate will have proven experience in product management, a strong understanding of the generative AI landscape, and exceptional collaboration and communication skills.

Responsibilities include engaging with customers, translating market dynamics into a product vision, and partnering closely with engineering. Join us to unlock the potential of AI in enterprises and promote a healthy work-life balance.

Product Manager, Digital Health, is a full-time position responsible for leading a cross-functional product team focused on patient engagement, driving product discovery and delivery, and ensuring alignment with strategic goals and user needs. jobs.role: Senior Technical Product Manager - Remote Healthcare Tech
jobs.description_snippet:
A leading government IT transformation company is seeking a Technical Product Manager to oversee the software development lifecycle for its products. This fully remote position allows you to work collaboratively across engineering and design teams to ensure quality and alignment with customer needs. Candidates should have over 8 years of experience in product management within a healthcare setting, strong communication skills, and proficiency in Agile methodologies.

This role offers a competitive salary range of $150,000 to $160,000 annually.

jobs.role: Senior Product Manager, AI and Computing Infrastructure Orchestration, Security and Compliance

In accordance with Washington state law, we are highlighting our comprehensive benefits package, which is available to all eligible US based employees. Benefits for this role include:

• Health, dental, vision, life, disability insurance

• Retirement Benefits: 401(k) with company match

• Paid Time Off: 20 days of vacation per year, accruing at a rate of 6.15 hours per pay period for the first five years of employment

• Sick Time: 40 hours/year (increased to 69 hours/year for Seattle) including 5 discretionary sick days per instance

• Maternity Leave (Short-Term Disability + Baby Bonding):

About RoomPriceGenie

Founded in 2017, RoomPriceGenie is dedicated to helping hoteliers around the globe achieve optimal pricing. We understand that many small hotels face challenges with digitalization, making their operations increasingly complex and often resulting in lost revenue. We have developed a powerful solution that enables hotels to set the right prices in just seconds. Our state‑of‑the‑art algorithm analyzes both internal hotel data and market trends to recommend pricing strategies that enhance revenue and improve booking rates. What is SeekOut?

SeekOut helps organizations hire, grow, and retain talent by bringing together recruiting, talent management, and analytics into one platform. The goal is simple: help companies better understand their people and connect them to the right opportunities.
What are we looking to add to our team?

We’re looking for a Senior Product Manager to help define and build the next generation of AI-powered recruiting experiences.
